area: Rosyth School 1km — landed for sale (Serangoon Gardens east edge / Serangoon North)
pulled: 2026-07-03 via WebSearch + OneMap 距离实测（PropertyGuru / 99.co / EdgeProp / SRX; portal 直接访问受限，经站内搜索采集）
benchmark_note: 每个边界均可溯源（土地 psf 口径）：terrace 下界 1,134 = 91 Cardiff Grove 成交（2026-02），上界 2,815 = Alnwick Rd 2,301sqft 成交（2026-06）；semi_d 下界 1,469 = Tavistock Ave 挂牌，上界 3,003 = L05 Bridport Ave 挂牌（2,158sqft）；detached 下界 1,500 = Serangoon Garden Way 挂牌，上界 1,597 = Alnwick Rd 7,075sqft 成交（2026-06）——detached 仅 2-3 个数据点，低置信。L06 Cowdray 的 1,792 为建筑面积 psf，已从基准带剔除。全部为 999 年地契口径；estate-wide 参考带 EdgeProp S$1,131–3,472（12 个月）。 方法注记：L05/L08/L10 本身定义了带边界，对照该带评级时天然为 FAIR——跨带判断以成交锚（1,134 / 2,815 / 1,597）为准。

listings.notes: PropertyGuru listing; 2.5-storey, home lift, swimming pool. Land_psf computed as price/land_sqft = 9,380,000/3,692. OneMap street-ref 1.88km（1-2km 带）。 洪水：PUB 官方易涝名单（2024-01 版）无本区任何道路——按区域低风险计；低洼单点仍应雨后现场复看。

99.co listing snippet only gave land 2,441-2,655 sqft range and 5 beds; price/psf not captured -- needs direct portal check before use as a hard data point. OneMap street-ref 1.88km（1-2km 带）。 洪水：PUB 官方易涝名单（2024-01 版）无本区任何道路——按区域低风险计；低洼单点仍应雨后现场复看。

listings.flood_risk: unverified -- Serangoon North has had historical PUB flood-alert monitoring near Sungei Serangoon; check PUB flood-prone areas list
listings.notes: 11 min walk to Serangoon North MRT (CR9) per listing. Land_psf computed as 6,500,000/2,572. This is the strongest in-1km candidate street given proximity to the school on the same (Serangoon North Ave 4) side. OneMap street-ref 1.08km（⚠margin：近校端门牌可能 <1km，逐址实测）。
